title: First of all, my car is not going to your shop.
content:
First of all, my car is not going to your shop.

My car is going to Mercedes.

It is a Mercedes, it will go to Mercedes to get there.

And secondly, I am not going to spend one single dollar, I'm not laying a penny out.

You are going to pay for everything up front.

I'm not paying for anything.

He's like, "Well, let me see if I can quote corporate and I can ask him."

I was like, "Well, it's really not an asking question , okay?

Is a Marriott?

What was it?

Yeah, it was a Marriot.

But they're a third party.

The valet company is a third party.

What kind of what other people were that?

Was it like a lot of nice cars or was it not like that?

It was more middle class?

It was it's off season now.

So it was, I swear to God, I think there was a summer camp there.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 186 (chunk 186/225)
